caption: A group of martial artists perform a choreographed routine with staffs in a large, ornate hall. The central figure, dressed in a golden outfit, leads the performance with dynamic and precise movements. Surrounding him are four other performers, two in blue and two in light blue, who mirror his actions with their own staffs. The audience, seated around the perimeter of the room, watches attentively as the performers execute synchronized strikes and defensive maneuvers. The atmosphere is one of focused energy and discipline, highlighted by the grand chandelier hanging from the ceiling and the elegant decor of the venue.
